mapper.sql: role_id, role_name, role_key, role_sort, status, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.status, r.create_time FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 0 ORDER BY r.role_sort
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_name, role_key, role_sort, status, create_time) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleKey}, #{roleSort}, #{status}, #{createTime})
